keys.description: Default value for Facility.min_booking_duration_minutes when the create path doesn't set it explicitly.
Default value for Facility.max_booking_duration_minutes.
Default booking_slot_step_minutes. Facilities may override per-row.
Default advance_booking_window_days. Corporate tenants often bump to 90 via the /facilities/{id} PATCH.
Default cancellation_notice_hours. Cancels inside this window face full charge (Wave 4 refund flow decides).
ExpireLapsedBookingsJob cancels pending-status bookings that stay pending past this window.
MarkNoShowJob transitions confirmed→no_show when starts_at + this many minutes has passed without check-in.
MarkBookingCompletedJob transitions confirmed→completed when ends_at + this many minutes has passed.
DB isolation level for the overlap check. Default SERIALIZABLE. Downgrade only in high-concurrency test environments where the reconciler catches drift — production must stay SERIALIZABLE.
Default pricing model when the create path doesn't set pricing_json explicitly.

true = booking captures the resolved price at booking-time (subsequent pricing_json edits do NOT retroactively reprice). false = booking reads pricing_json live at each display (breaks financial audit — never turn off in production).
PricingCalculator caches resolved rate lookups for 5 min. Invalidated by FacilityPricingUpdated event.
Cascade-cancellation on FacilityBlackoutAdded processes affected bookings in batches of this size.
Cap on Facility.blackout_dates array length. Tenants with more than 100 concurrent blackouts should model those as recurring facility hours instead.
Template for ReceiptNumberGenerator. Available substitutions: {tenant_prefix}, {year}, {month}, {sequential:Nd}.
Max days ahead a day pass may be issued for. Beyond this, sell a Pass instead.
Refunds accepted only within this many days of purchase. Refused after.
RedactAnonymousDayPassProfileJob redacts anonymous profile fields this many days after consumed_at.
Default (valid_until - valid_from) window for newly-issued passes when the caller doesn't specify.
PassExpiringNotification fires this many days before valid_until.
ReconcileBookingOverlapsJob scans this many facility_id rows per pass.
Baseline for the reconciler alerts. Any finding above this is a P1 signal.
How many hours before starts_at to dispatch reminders. Two-shot default (24h + 1h). Set to [] to disable.
Bookings created less than this many hours before starts_at skip reminder scheduling entirely.
Default Facility.capacity_persons when the create path doesn't set it. Single-user facilities (a treadmill, one lane) leave this at 1.
